MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion Opposing Co-Defendant Chi Kong Cheung'S Application For Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion Opposing Co-Defendant Chi Kong Cheung's Application For Good Faith Settlement.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion opposing co-defendant Chi Kong Cheung's application for good faith settlement determination is denied and Cheung's application is granted. Cheung's $250,000 settlement negotiated with plaintiffs is for his auto insurance policy's limits. Considering the factors set out in Tech-Bilt v. Woodward-Clyde & Associates (1985) 38 Cal.3d 488, 499, the settlement is in good faith.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email:RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
